question: What are the two fundamental materials used in Ethereal 'Ghost-Nets'?

answers.original: Ethereal Ghost-Nets are woven from **Spirit-Thread** and reinforced with **Phantom-Wire**.

ops.description: The Dark-Council governs from the Obsidian Throne.
Growth-Force can make seeds sprout in seconds.

entities.name: Ethereal Ghost-Nets
entities.description: Ethereal Ghost-Nets are woven from Spirit-Thread and reinforced with Phantom-Wire, designed to capture supernatural beings.

entities.name: Ethereal Crafters
entities.description: Ethereal crafters work only during midnight hours to weave Ghost-Nets.

entities.name: Phantom-Wire
entities.description: Phantom-Wire is used to reinforce Spirit-Thread and vibrates at supernatural frequencies.

entities.name: Spirit-Thread
entities.description: Spirit-Thread is spun from ectoplasmic residue and is nearly invisible to normal sight.

relations.description: Ethereal hunters specialize in capturing supernatural beings using Ethereal Ghost-Nets.
Ethereal Ghost-Nets are reinforced with Phantom-Wire, allowing them to interact with both physical and spiritual entities.
Ethereal Ghost-Nets are woven from Spirit-Thread, which is essential for capturing supernatural beings.
Ethereal Ghost-Nets are designed to capture and hold incorporeal creatures.
Ghost-Net weaving requires psychic sensitivity, which ethereal hunters possess.
Ethereal crafters work only during midnight hours to weave Ghost-Nets.

entities.name: Magma-Shields
entities.description: Magma-Shields are protective gear forged with Lava-Stone and reinforced with Obsidian-Mesh, designed to withstand extreme heat.

entities.name: Crystalline Structure
entities.description: The crystalline structure of Solara allows for the efficient absorption and temporary storage of radiant energy, particularly visible light.
